title: Demand Modeling

frontmatter.title: Demand Modeling
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of forecasting demand and sequencing build — estimating subscribers and traffic from population and market signals, and ordering rollouts to serve demand efficiently over time.

body:
# Skill · Demand Modeling

A growth competency: the agent can forecast where demand will materialize from population, geography,
and market signals, and sequence a rollout so that demand is served efficiently as capital is paced
over time.

## Conferred by
- [GROW-210](../schools/growth-planning/departments/demand-market/courses/grow-210.md)
- [GROW-310](../schools/growth-planning/departments/deployment/courses/grow-310.md)

## Examined by
[Growth & Planning Exam](../benchmarks/grow-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Growth & Planning — Silver](../certifications/growth-planning-silver.md). Mirrors the
demand-forecast dimension of the agun.ai `EvaluationScores`.

Part of the [School of Growth & Planning](../schools/growth-planning/index.md).
